entries.title: SyncClient auth token validation may reject legitimate platform tokens (base64 chars +, /, =); verify platform token format before V1.1
entries.target: V1.1 — verify platform token format or loosen validation
entries.closure_note: Extended validate_auth_token to allow standard Base64 alphabet (+, /, =) alongside existing ASCII alnum and - _ .; added unit test client_creation_accepts_base64_alphabet_token.
entries.closure_evidence: cargo test -p nexus-sync; see qc-self report 2026-04-10-cli-sync-bidirectional-parity-qc-self-20260411.md
